chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1150 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6880/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6881/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of protective bail application 28.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ayaz Shaikh, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicant / accused Shakeel Ahmed S/o Abdul Majeed Soomro seeks protective bail in Crime No.302/2025, registered at Police Station Preedy, District South, Karachi, under Section 489-F, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
